7.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
7.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

8.gl: compare G5316 (φαίνω), G5346 (φημί)); luminousness (in the widest application, natural or artificial, abstract or concrete, literal or figurative)
8.dv: from an obsolete (to shine or make manifest, especially by rays;

10.gl: figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
10.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

18.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);
